experiences.title: AI Developer
experiences.description: Building an LLM-powered chatbot on top of an ERP system: users ask business questions in natural language and get answers grounded in live database content via a Python backend and modern model integrations.
achievements: Designed and shipped conversational flows over ERP data with database-grounded responses
Python services for retrieval, orchestration, and integration with LLM providers
Partnered with business stakeholders to tune prompts, guardrails, and evaluation for production Q&A

experiences.title: Software Engineer
experiences.description: Software engineering on BUDG, a proprietary (closed-source) data governance platform: role-based access, metadata management, and supporting services for enterprise data policies.
achievements: Shipped features on BUDG — closed-source data governance application used in production environments
Java 17 WAR deployed on Tomcat 11 with Jakarta Servlets (no Spring), Elasticsearch Java API client for search and indexing
MySQL with HikariCP, JWT and LDAP-backed authentication, OpenAPI-described REST endpoints, WebSockets where needed
Bulk exports and reporting (Apache POI / Excel, iText PDF), transactional email (Jakarta Mail), structured logging (SLF4J / Logback)

experiences.title: Programmer Intern
experiences.description: Gained hands-on experience in software development and programming.
achievements: Developed programming skills in real-world applications
Collaborated with team members on various projects
